signals.title: Republic Act No. 11648
signals.summary: Enacted on March 4, 2022, this law strengthens protections against rape and sexual exploitation by increasing the age for determining statutory rape.
key_provisions: Increases the age for determining statutory rape
Strengthens protections against rape and sexual exploitation

signals.title: Department of Education (DepEd) Memorandum No. 064, s. 2025
signals.summary: Issued in March 2025, this memorandum mandates schools to draft child protection policies, establish referral systems, and coordinate with law enforcement to safeguard children from abuse and bullying.
key_provisions: Mandates schools to draft child protection policies

signals.title: Internet Transactions Act (Republic Act No. 11967)
signals.summary: Signed into law on December 5, 2023, this act regulates e-commerce activities, ensuring consumer protection and promoting a secure online marketplace.
